channel.title: Pages on O.R. in Action
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on O.R. in Action

item.title: Reading
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: I am an avid reader and below compiles the books I read or am reading… 2020 A liberated mind Thinking, fast and slow Nudge: Improving Decisions About Health, Wealth, and Happiness Winning the Loser’s Game 2019 The gardener and the carpenter Everything I never told you So you want to talk about race Peak Crush it! Quiet power: the secret strengths of introverts The simple path to wealth Bad blood: secrets and lies in a silicon valley startup Army of none: autonomous weapons and the future of war The subtle art of not giving a f*ck: a counterintuitive approach to living a good life Me before you The little prince Becoming Deep work The one thing The kite runner The shallows: what the internet is doing to our brains The road less traveled Irrational exuberance Educated Far from the tree The psychology of wealth Someday is not a day in the week Anonymous Limitless mind: learn, lead and live without barriers No Hard Feelings: The Secret Power of Embracing Emotions at Work by Liz Fosslien and West Duffy, Mollie All the Wrong Moves: A Memoir About Chess, Love, and Ruining Everything by Sasha Chapin Now is the way: an unconventional approach to modern mindfulness Some of my friends are …: the daunting challenges and untapped benefits of cross-racial friendships Principles Digital minimalism Naked money

item.title: Resume
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: Summary Currently Sr. Data Scientist (Operations Research) working at Walmart Labs. Education Ph.D. in Industrial Engineering University of Arkansas, 2012 - 2017 Dissertation: service consistency in vehicle routing M.S. in Industrial Engineering Huazhong University of Science and Technology, 2009 - 2012 Thesis topic: manufacturing system optimization B.S. in Industrial Engineering Huazhong University of Science and Technology, 2005 - 2009 Thesis topic: process planning optimization Experience Sr.

item.title: C++
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: This page lists all the C++-related posts. Data types Variable initialization Study Log C++ Primer

item.title: CPLEX
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: This is an index page for all CPLEX-related posts. CPLEX Java API Setup API deep dive IloAddable, IloModel and IloModeler IloLPMatrix Model building By row without IloLPMatrix with IloLPMatirx By column without IloLPMatrix with IloLPMatrix Callback Optimization callback Continuous callback Tuning callback

item.title: Java
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: This is an index page for all Java-related posts. poi lombok MultiKeyMap

item.title: About Me
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: Hello! My name is Kunlei Lian, and I’m a Sr. Data Scientist working at Walmart Labs. What’s This Site For I tend to forget things if I don’t jot them down at the moment of learning or active using. I am also a firm believer of output-driven learning strategy, which promotes facilitating, enhancing and internalizing the learning through consciously writing it down and publishing it. After all, one has to understand a subject good enough in order to share it, and the process of writing is a very good way of digesting new knowledge.
